project.component: { "keyToString": { "CMake 应用程序.26th_half_steering_infantry.executor": "Run", "OpenOCD 下载并运行.26th_balance_infantry.executor": "Run", "OpenOCD 下载并运行.26th_half_steering_infantry.elf.executor": "Run", "OpenOCD 下载并运行.26th_half_steering_infantry.executor": "Debug", "RunOnceActivity.RadMigrateCodeStyle": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "RunOnceActivity.readMode.enableVisualFormatting": "true", "cf.first.check.clang-format": "false", "cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "master", "last_opened_file_path": "D:/RM2026/26th_balance_infantry/26th_balanced_code", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "CMakeSettings", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }
